commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a comparison section to `docs/reference/code-mode.md` and a reverse link in `docs/plugins/codex-harness.md` distinguishing OpenClaw code mode from Codex Code Mode.

PR surface: Docs +25. Total +25 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as an issue reproduction; this is a docs PR. The remaining problem is source-verifiable by comparing the PR-rendered docs text with OpenClaw and upstream Codex source.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow docs wording repair can be attempted on the PR branch without runtime changes or product/API decisions.

target.title: docs: clarify OpenClaw vs Codex code mode
target.body:
## Summary
- add a side-by-side comparison table for OpenClaw code mode vs Codex Code Mode in `docs/reference/code-mode.md`
- add a reverse link from `docs/plugins/codex-harness.md` so Codex harness readers can quickly find the comparison
- clarify the different defaults, runtimes, policy ownership, and `exec` contracts without changing runtime behavior

Closes #83390.

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `pnpm docs:check-links`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:**
Users reading the code mode documentation were unclear about the differences between OpenClaw native code mode and Codex Code Mode. This adds a comparison table to `docs/reference/code-mode.md` and a reverse link from `docs/plugins/codex-harness.md`.

**Real environment tested:**
openclaw repo, Node 22, Linux x86_64

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
pnpm docs:list
pnpm docs:check-mdx
pnpm docs:check-links
git diff --check
```

**Evidence after fix:**

All docs checks pass with no broken links or MDX syntax errors. The diff is confined to two markdown files (`docs/reference/code-mode.md` and `docs/plugins/codex-harness.md`) with no runtime code changes.

**Observed result after fix:**
- `pnpm docs:list` confirms both changed docs are in the docs index
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx` passes with no errors
- `pnpm docs:check-links` passes (no broken internal links)
- `git diff --check` passes (no whitespace errors)

**What was not tested:**
Live docs rendering on docs.openclaw.ai. Changes are markdown-only with standard Mintlify-compatible syntax.

Closes #83390.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: huangting-xy

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
